atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain in the inside of his right knee, describing it as sharp and worsening with flexion.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain in the left hand.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain started yesterday after a fall while changing a light bulb on a ladder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes ibuprofen with minimal relief.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends motrin 800 mg every 6 hours as needed for pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a knee brace and crutches for temporary use.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a follow-up appointment in one week to assess progress and consider an MRI if symptoms do not improve.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals tenderness to palpation over the medial aspect of the right knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician notes tenderness over the medial meniscus area.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician suspects a medial meniscus sprain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's history includes prior afib.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's history includes a previous nose job.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The x-ray shows no fractures or dislocations.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The x-ray shows some fluid is present.
